name: app.R
content: # MUPLAB living meta-analysis — real-R engine (shinylive/webR) # Model: bayesmeta, registered priors mu ~ N(0, 0.5), tau ~ Half-Normal(0.3). # Data: the 36 primary effects (22 ACC + 14 RT) + 2 extinction effects (S29c, S29d, # excluded by default), identical to ROWS_ALL in living-ma.html. # Study labels for S13a/S13b/S29c/S29d carry disambiguation suffixes ([S13a], # "(extinction)") that ROWS_ALL shows in separate ID/badge columns instead. # RT effects are already sign-standardised: positive g favors taVNS. library(shiny) library(bayesmeta) DATA <- read.csv(text = ' id,study,dom,out,g,se,prim,des S02,Zhao 2022,Work,acc,0.297,0.130,1,within S03,Mertens 2020,Decl,acc,0.093,0.155,1,within S04,"Bömmer 2024",Cog,acc,0.246,0.212,1,within S06,Jongkees 2018,Cog,acc,0.178,0.316,1,between S07,Kaan 2021,Work,acc,0.205,0.373,1,between S08,Mary 2026,Decl,acc,0.096,0.045,1,within S12,"D\'Agostini 2021",Skill,acc,-0.166,0.148,1,between S13a,Honda 2024 [S13a],Skill,acc,0.092,0.155,1,between S13b,Honda 2024 [S13b],Skill,acc,-0.098,0.155,1,between S17,Thakkar 2020,Skill,acc,0.610,0.349,1,between S19,"Sönmez 2025",Cog,acc,0.177,0.187,1,within S21,Phillips 2022,Skill,acc,0.275,0.302,1,between S22,Konjusha 2023,Work,acc,0.243,0.167,1,within S23,"Kühnel 2020",Skill,acc,-0.334,0.164,1,within S25,Thakkar 2025,Skill,acc,0.797,0.434,1,between S26,Giraudier 2020,Decl,acc,0.057,0.259,1,between S27a,Sun 2021 Exp 1,Work,acc,0.370,0.152,1,within S27b,Sun 2021 Exp 2,Work,acc,0.316,0.134,1,within S28,Tian 2023,Work,acc,0.190,0.105,1,within S29a,"Çakır 2025",Skill,acc,0.535,0.228,1,between S29c,"Çakır 2025 (extinction)",Skill,acc,0.495,0.228,0,between S30a,"Ventura-Bort 2025 — Study 1",Decl,acc,0.000,0.182,1,within S30b,"Ventura-Bort 2025 — Study 2",Decl,acc,0.174,0.261,1,between S01,Chen 2024,Skill,rt,0.652,0.235,1,within S02,Zhao 2022,Work,rt,-0.172,0.126,1,within S04,"Bömmer 2024",Cog,rt,0.133,0.210,1,within S06,Jongkees 2018,Cog,rt,0.398,0.319,1,between S07,Kaan 2021,Work,rt,-0.102,0.371,1,between S11,Sommer 2023,Cog,rt,0.094,0.176,1,within S16,Li 2025,Cog,rt,0.333,0.307,1,between S17,Thakkar 2020,Skill,rt,0.761,0.354,1,between S19,"Sönmez 2025",Cog,rt,0.324,0.190,1,within S21,Phillips 2022,Skill,rt,0.157,0.300,1,between S27a,Sun 2021 Exp 1,Work,rt,0.146,0.148,1,within S27b,Sun 2021 Exp 2,Work,rt,0.072,0.130,1,within S28,Tian 2023,Work,rt,-0.188,0.105,1,within S29b,"Çakır 2025",Skill,rt,0.803,0.232,1,between S29d,"Çakır 2025 (extinction)",Skill,rt,2.655,0.307,0,between ', stringsAsFactors = FALSE) DATA$key <- paste(DATA$id, DATA$out, sep = "_") DOM_ORDER <- c("Decl", "Work", "Cog", "Skill") DOM_LABEL <- c(Decl = "Declarative Memory", Work = "Working Memory", Cog = "Cognitive Control", Skill = "Associative & Skill Acquisition") # Registered brms reference (fixed; identical to the LOCK values on living-ma.html) LOCK <- list( acc = list(g = 0.148, crl = 0.060, cru = 0.246, P = 0.999, tau = 0.112, pil = -0.131, piu = 0.443, k = 22), rt = list(g = 0.184, crl = 0.016, cru = 0.371, P = 0.983, tau = 0.245, pil = -0.366, piu = 0.764, k = 14) ) MU_PRIOR_SD <- 0.5 TAU_PRIOR_SCALE <- 0.3 TEAL <- "#235e56"; TEAL2 <- "#2f7d72"; DEEP <- "#1b4842" INK <- "#1f2328"; MUT <- "#6b7178"; BG <- "#f5f7f6"; LINE <- "#e3e7e5" fmt <- function(x) sprintf("%+.2f", x) fciv <- function(l, u) sprintf("[%.2f, %.2f]", l, u) # ---- UI --------------------------------------------------------------------- domain_checkboxes <- function(out_code) { lapply(DOM_ORDER, function(dm) { d <- DATA[DATA$out == out_code & DATA$dom == dm, ] if (nrow(d) == 0) return(NULL) d <- d[order(d$g), ] tagList( div(class = "domh", DOM_LABEL[[dm]]), checkboxGroupInput(paste0("inc_", out_code, "_", dm), label = NULL, choiceNames = as.list(d$study), choiceValues = as.list(d$key), selected = d$key[d$prim == 1]) ) }) } ui <- fluidPage( lang = "en", tags$head( tags$title("Living Meta-Analysis · R engine · MUPLAB"), tags$style(HTML(paste0(" @font-face{font-family:'Inter';src:url('/assets/fonts/inter-latin.woff2') format('woff2');font-weight:100 900;font-display:swap;} @font-face{font-family:'Newsreader';src:url('/assets/fonts/newsreader-latin.woff2') format('woff2');font-weight:200 800;font-display:swap;} html,body{background:", BG, ";color:", INK, ";font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;} .container-fluid{max-width:1180px;padding:0 20px 48px;} .topbar{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;border-bottom:1px solid ", LINE, ";padding:18px 0 14px;margin-bottom:18px;} .topbar .brand{font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.4px;color:", DEEP, ";font-size:17px;text-decoration:none;} .topbar .brand span{color:", TEAL2, ";} .topbar .back{margin-left:auto;font-size:13.5px;color:", TEAL2, ";text-decoration:none;} .topbar .back:hover{text-decoration:underline;} h1{font-family:'Newsreader',Georgia,serif;font-weight:600;font-size:30px;margin:2px 0 6px;color:", INK, ";} .sub{color:", MUT, ";font-size:14.5px;max-width:74ch;margin:0 0 18px;} .grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:290px 1fr;gap:22px;align-items:start;} @media(max-width:840px){.grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}} .card{background:#fff;border:1px solid ", LINE, ";border-radius:10px;padding:16px 18px;} .card h3{font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:", MUT, ";margin:0 0 10px;font-weight:700;} .domh{font-weight:700;font-size:13.5px;margin:14px 0 6px;color:", INK, ";} .shiny-input-checkboxgroup{margin-bottom:4px;} .checkbox{margin:2px 0;} .checkbox label{font-size:13.5px;color:", INK, ";} .shiny-input-checkboxgroup .checkbox input{accent-color:", TEAL, ";} .radio label{font-size:14px;} .shiny-input-radiogroup .radio input{accent-color:", TEAL, ";} .btnrow{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:10px 0 2px;} .btn-default{background:", TEAL, ";color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:7px;font-size:13.5px;padding:7px 14px;} .btn-default:hover{background:", DEEP, ";color:#fff;} .btn-default.ghost{background:#fff;color:", TEAL, ";border:1px solid ", LINE, ";} .btn-default.ghost:hover{background:", BG, ";color:", DEEP, ";} .tiles{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:10px;margin:0 0 14px;} .tile{background:#fff;border:1px solid ", LINE, ";border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;} .tile .num{font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:", INK, ";} .tile .num.pos{color:", TEAL2, ";} .tile .lbl{font-size:12px;color:", MUT, ";margin-top:2px;} .refline{font-size:13px;color:", MUT, ";background:#fff;border:1px dashed #cdd5d2;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;margin:0 0 16px;} .modelbox{font-size:13px;color:", MUT, ";border-top:1px solid ", LINE, ";margin-top:18px;padding-top:12px;} .modelbox b{color:", INK, ";} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:", MUT, ";margin-top:10px;} .shiny-output-error-validation{color:", MUT, ";font-size:14px;padding:18px 0;} #forest.recalculating,#tiles.recalculating,#refline.recalculating,#metaforline.recalculating{opacity:.35;} "))) ), div(class = "topbar", tags$a(class = "brand", href = "/living-ma.html", target = "_top", HTML("MUPLAB")), tags$a(class = "back", href = "/living-ma.html", target = "_top", "← Back to the living meta-analysis")), h1("Interactive explorer — real-R engine"), p(class = "sub", "Bayesian random-effects meta-analysis computed by the R package bayesmeta, ", "running natively in your browser through webR (WebAssembly) — no server. ", "Priors as registered: μ ~ N(0, 0.5), τ ~ Half-Normal(0.3). ", "ACC and RT are pooled separately; positive g favors taVNS."), div(class = "grid", div(class = "card", h3("Pool"), radioButtons("outcome", label = NULL, choices = c("Accuracy (ACC)" = "acc", "Reaction time (RT)" = "rt"), selected = "acc"), div(class = "btnrow", actionButton("run", "Run analysis"), actionButton("reset", "Registered corpus", class = "ghost")), p(class = "note", "Tick or untick studies, then press Run. Extinction effects (S29c, S29d) ", "are outside the registered corpus and start unticked."), h3(style = "margin-top:16px", "Studies"), conditionalPanel("input.outcome == 'acc'", domain_checkboxes("acc")), conditionalPanel("input.outcome == 'rt'", domain_checkboxes("rt")) ), div( uiOutput("tiles"), uiOutput("refline"), div(class = "card", plotOutput("forest", height = "auto")), uiOutput("metaforline"), div(class = "modelbox", HTML(paste0( "Model & priors. Normal–normal hierarchical random-effects model ", "(bayesmeta); effect prior μ ~ N(0, 0.5), heterogeneity prior ", "τ ~ Half-Normal(0.3); central 95% credible intervals. ", "RT effects enter with direction standardised (×−1), so positive g favors taVNS ", "for both outcomes. The registered headline values on the living-MA page come from ", "brms (MCMC); this in-browser engine recomputes the same model with bayesmeta ", "(semi-analytic). First load downloads the R runtime and packages ", "(tens of MB) — later visits use the browser cache."))), p(class = "note", "Selections here run only in your browser and are not recorded.") ) ) ) # ---- server ----------------------------------------------------------------- run_bayesmeta <- function(d) { bayesmeta(y = d$g, sigma = d$se, labels = d$study, mu.prior.mean = 0, mu.prior.sd = MU_PRIOR_SD, tau.prior = function(t) dhalfnormal(t, scale = TAU_PRIOR_SCALE)) } server <- function(input, output, session) { # When reset fires, res() must recompute the registered corpus directly: # updateCheckboxGroupInput values only round-trip on the next flush, so # reading the checkboxes in the same flush would see the pre-reset state. resetFlag <- reactiveVal(FALSE) observeEvent(input$reset, priority = 10, { for (oc in c("acc", "rt")) for (dm in DOM_ORDER) { d <- DATA[DATA$out == oc & DATA$dom == dm, ] if (nrow(d) > 0) updateCheckboxGroupInput(session, paste0("inc_", oc, "_", dm), selected = d$key[d$prim == 1]) } resetFlag(TRUE) }) selected <- function() { oc <- input$outcome keys <- unlist(lapply(DOM_ORDER, function(dm) input[[paste0("inc_", oc, "_", dm)]])) DATA[DATA$key %in% keys & DATA$out == oc, ] } res <- eventReactive(list(input$run, input$outcome, input$reset), ignoreNULL = FALSE, { d <- if (isTRUE(resetFlag())) { resetFlag(FALSE) DATA[DATA$out == input$outcome & DATA$prim == 1, ] } else { selected() } validate(need(nrow(d) >= 2, "Fewer than two studies selected — tick studies on the left, then press Run.")) d <- d[order(match(d$dom, DOM_ORDER), d$g), ] bm <- run_bayesmeta(d) mu <- bm$summary["mean", "mu"] ci <- bm$post.interval(mu.level = 0.95, method = "central") tau <- bm$summary["mean", "tau"] pi <- bm$post.interval(theta.level = 0.95, predict = TRUE, method = "central") pg0 <- 1 - bm$pposterior(mu = 0) mf <- tryCatch(metafor::rma(yi = d$g, sei = d$se, method = "REML"), error = function(e) NULL) list(d = d, mu = mu, ci = ci, tau = tau, pi = pi, pg0 = pg0, mf = mf, oc = input$outcome) }) output$tiles <- renderUI({ r <- res() tile <- function(num, lbl, pos = FALSE) div(class = "tile", div(class = paste("num", if (pos) "pos"), num), div(class = "lbl", lbl)) div(class = "tiles", tile(fmt(r$mu), "Pooled g (posterior mean)", pos = r$mu > 0), tile(fciv(r$ci[1], r$ci[2]), "95% CrI"), tile(if (r$pg0 > 0.9995) ">99.9%" else sprintf("%.1f%%", 100 * r$pg0), "P(g > 0)"), tile(sprintf("%.2f", r$tau), "τ (posterior mean)"), tile(fciv(r$pi[1], r$pi[2]), "95% prediction interval"), tile(nrow(r$d), "k (effects in pool)")) }) output$refline <- renderUI({ r <- res(); lk <- LOCK[[r$oc]] div(class = "refline", HTML(sprintf( "Registered brms (fixed reference, full corpus): g = %s %s · P(g>0) = %.1f%% · τ = %.2f · PI %s · k = %d", fmt(lk$g), fciv(lk$crl, lk$cru), 100 * lk$P, lk$tau, fciv(lk$pil, lk$piu), lk$k))) }) output$metaforline <- renderUI({ r <- res() if (is.null(r$mf)) return(NULL) div(class = "refline", style = "margin-top:16px", HTML(sprintf( "Frequentist check — metafor REML random-effects on the same pool: g = %s %s · τ = %.2f", fmt(as.numeric(r$mf$b)), fciv(r$mf$ci.lb, r$mf$ci.ub), sqrt(r$mf$tau2)))) }) forest_height <- reactive({ r <- res() ndom <- length(unique(r$d$dom)) 90 + 26 * (nrow(r$d) + 2 * ndom + 4) + 60 }) output$forest <- renderPlot(height = function() forest_height(), res = 96, { r <- res(); d <- r$d d$lo <- d$g - 1.96 * d$se d$hi <- d$g + 1.96 * d$se # row layout: per domain -> header, studies, gap; then overall + prediction items <- list() for (dm in DOM_ORDER) { dd <- d[d$dom == dm, ] if (nrow(dd) == 0) next items[[length(items) + 1]] <- list(type = "head", lab = DOM_LABEL[[dm]]) for (i in seq_len(nrow(dd))) items[[length(items) + 1]] <- list(type = "study", row = dd[i, ]) items[[length(items) + 1]] <- list(type = "gap") } items[[length(items) + 1]] <- list(type = "overall") items[[length(items) + 1]] <- list(type = "pred") n <- length(items) x0 <- min(c(d$lo, r$pi[1], 0)); x1 <- max(c(d$hi, r$pi[2], 0)) padx <- 0.06 * (x1 - x0); x0 <- x0 - padx; x1 <- x1 + padx W <- x1 - x0 xlab_left <- x0 - 0.72 * W # label column anchor xlab_right <- x1 + 0.42 * W # value column anchor op <- par(mar = c(4.2, 0.5, 2.4, 0.5), family = "sans", xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i") on.exit(par(op)) plot.new() plot.window(xlim = c(xlab_left, xlab_right), ylim = c(0.5, n + 1.8)) wmax <- max(1 / d$se^2) ytop <- n + 1.1 # header text(xlab_left, ytop, "Study", adj = 0, font = 2, cex = 0.95) text(xlab_right, ytop, "g [95% CI]", adj = 1, font = 2, cex = 0.95) segments(xlab_left, ytop - 0.55, xlab_right, ytop - 0.55, col = INK, lwd = 1.1) # dotted zero line across the plot area ybot <- 0.7 segments(0, ybot, 0, ytop - 0.55, lty = 3, col = INK) y <- n for (it in items) { if (it$type == "head") { text(xlab_left, y, it$lab, adj = 0, font = 2, cex = 0.92) } else if (it$type == "study") { rw <- it$row serif <- 0.11 segments(rw$lo, y, rw$hi, y, lwd = 1.1, col = INK) segments(c(rw$lo, rw$hi), y - serif, c(rw$lo, rw$hi), y + serif, lwd = 1.1, col = INK) cexsq <- 0.55 + 1.45 * sqrt((1 / rw$se^2) / wmax) points(rw$g, y, pch = 15, cex = cexsq, col = INK) text(xlab_left + 0.03 * W, y, rw$study, adj = 0, cex = 0.86) text(xlab_right, y, sprintf("%.2f [%5.2f, %5.2f]", rw$g, rw$lo, rw$hi), adj = 1, cex = 0.86) } else if (it$type == "overall") { dh <- 0.32 polygon(c(r$ci[1], r$mu, r$ci[2], r$mu), c(y, y + dh, y, y - dh), col = INK, border = INK) text(xlab_left, y, "Overall (posterior mean, 95% CrI)", adj = 0, font = 2, cex = 0.9) text(xlab_right, y, sprintf("%.2f [%5.2f, %5.2f]", r$mu, r$ci[1], r$ci[2]), adj = 1, font = 2, cex = 0.88) } else if (it$type == "pred") { segments(r$pi[1], y, r$pi[2], y, lty = 2, col = INK, lwd = 1.2) segments(c(r$pi[1], r$pi[2]), y - 0.13, c(r$pi[1], r$pi[2]), y + 0.13, lty = 1, col = INK, lwd = 1.1) text(xlab_left, y, "95% prediction interval", adj = 0, cex = 0.88) text(xlab_right, y, sprintf("[%5.2f, %5.2f]", r$pi[1], r$pi[2]), adj = 1, cex = 0.86) } y <- y - 1 } ticks <- pretty(c(x0, x1), n = 6) ticks <- ticks[ticks >= x0 & ticks <= x1] axis(1, at = ticks, cex.axis = 0.85, lwd = 1, col = INK, padj = -0.6) olab <- if (r$oc == "acc") "Accuracy" else "RT" mtext(sprintf("Hedges g – %s (positive = favors taVNS)", olab), side = 1, line = 2.6, cex = 0.92, at = (x0 + x1) / 2) }) } shinyApp(ui, server)

name: DOGRULAMA.md
content:
# Doğrulama notu — üç motor karşılaştırması (2026-07-09)

Tam kayıtlı korpus üzerinde (ACC k=22, RT k=14; öncüller μ ~ N(0, 0.5),
τ ~ Half-Normal(0.3)). bayesmeta değerleri R 4.6.1 + bayesmeta ile yerel olarak
hesaplandı (`_tools/living-ma-shiny/app.R` ile aynı kod yolu); brms değerleri
sitedeki kayıtlı LOCK sabitleri; "JS eşlenik" living-ma.html'deki tarayıcı-içi
yaklaşık motor (handover'da bildirilen değer).

## Accuracy (k = 22)

| Motor | g | %95 CrI | τ | P(g>0) | %95 PI |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| brms (kayıtlı, MCMC) | 0.148 | [0.060, 0.246] | 0.112 | %99.9 | [−0.131, 0.443] |
| bayesmeta (Shiny/webR motoru) | 0.144 | [0.057, 0.239] | 0.109 | %99.87 | [−0.129, 0.431] |
| JS eşlenik panel (yaklaşık) | ~0.127 | — | — | — | — |

brms − bayesmeta farkları: g 0.004; CrI uçları ≤0.007; τ 0.003.
Sayfadaki "kayıtlı modelle ~0.01 örtüşür" iddiası bayesmeta motoru için doğrudur
ve fazlasıyla sağlanır.

## RT (k = 14)

| Motor | g | %95 CrI | τ | P(g>0) | %95 PI |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| brms (kayıtlı, MCMC) | 0.184 | [0.016, 0.371] | 0.245 | %98.3 | [−0.366, 0.764] |
| bayesmeta (Shiny/webR motoru) | 0.183 | [0.013, 0.370] | 0.244 | %98.24 | [−0.358, 0.751] |

Farklar: g 0.001; CrI uçları ≤0.003; τ 0.001.

## Frequentist çapraz kontrol (metafor REML, aynı veriler)

- ACC: g 0.146 [0.059, 0.233], τ 0.111
- RT:  g 0.193 [0.024, 0.362], τ 0.239

## Yorum

- bayesmeta ile brms aynı modelin iki uygulaması (yarı-analitik ve MCMC);
  0.01 içinde örtüşmeleri beklenen davranış ve doğrulandı.
- JS eşlenik panel bilinçli bir yaklaşıklıktır (kapalı-form eşlenik güncelleme);
  ~0.02 sapması, gerçek R motorunun siteye eklenme gerekçesidir.
- Raporlama eşlemesi: g = posterior ortalama, τ = posterior ortalama,
  CrI/PI = merkezî %95 (brms varsayılanlarıyla uyum için seçildi).
